CVE-2021-33582.title: Cyrus IMAP before 3.4.2 allows remote attackers to cause a denial ...
CVE-2021-33582.description: Cyrus IMAP before 3.4.2 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (multiple-minute daemon hang) via input that is mishandled during hash-table interaction. Because there are many insertions into a single bucket, strcmp becomes slow. This is fixed in 3.4.2, 3.2.8, and 3.0.16.

CVE-2024-34055.title: Cyrus IMAP before 3.8.3 and 3.10.x before 3.10.0-rc1 allows authe ...
CVE-2024-34055.description: Cyrus IMAP before 3.8.3 and 3.10.x before 3.10.0-rc1 allows authenticated attackers to cause unbounded memory allocation by sending many LITERALs in a single command.

CVE-2025-23394.title: A UNIX Symbolic Link (Symlink) Following vulnerability in openSUS ...
CVE-2025-23394.description: A UNIX Symbolic Link (Symlink) Following vulnerability in openSUSE Tumbleweed cyrus-imapd allows escalation from cyrus to root.This issue affects openSUSE Tumbleweed  cyrus-imapd before 3.8.4-2.1.
